title: Project Report: Requirements Doc for Mobile App Feature — Business Analyst
author: Gagan Pasupuleti
project_title: Requirements Doc for Mobile App Feature
summary: Elicit requirements for a 'dark mode' feature: interviews, user stories, acceptance criteria, mock wireframe.
source_file: CodeQuest project specification (official docs + industry patterns)

chapters.title: Project Overview
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Project Overview** *(Level: Beginner)*

**Requirements Doc for Mobile App Feature** is a beginner-level end-to-end project for Business Analyst. Duration: 2 weeks. Elicit requirements for a 'dark mode' feature: interviews, user stories, acceptance criteria, mock wireframe. Tools: Figma/Balsamiq, Confluence template.

Code Reference:
```text
Objective: 2 stakeholder interview summaries
Objective: 5 user stories with acceptance criteria
Objective: Wireframe mockup
Objective: Requirements traceability matrix
```
What it shows: Lists measurable outcomes before you start building.

### What it actually is
A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.

### When to use it
At project kickoff.

### Where to use it
Business Analyst portfolios and CodeQuest project submissions.

### Real use example
A candidate lists this project on a Business Analyst resume with a demo link.
key_takeaways: A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.
A candidate lists this project on a Business Analyst resume with a demo link.

Stakeholder interviews. Complete these tasks: Question guide; Notes. Deliverable for this phase: Interview summaries.

```text
- [ ] Notes
```

chapters.title: Final Deliverables and Review
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Final Deliverables and Review** *(Level: Beginner)*

Submit all final deliverables: Requirements doc; User stories; Wireframe; RTM. Skills demonstrated: Requirements, User stories, Wireframing. Prepare a 5-minute walkthrough video and README for CodeQuest teacher marking.

Code Reference:
```text
Deliverable: Requirements doc
Deliverable: User stories
Deliverable: Wireframe
Deliverable: RTM
```
What it shows: Final checklist ensures nothing is missing at submission.

### What it actually is
Deliverable review confirms end-to-end project completion.

### When to use it
Before deadline and teacher review.

### Where to use it
CodeQuest project gallery and interviews.

### Real use example
A student submits Requirements doc and passes the rubric.
